title: ilex congesta
intro: Ilex congesta, also known as New Zealand Holly or Mountain Holly, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Aquifoliaceae. The leaves and berries of the Ilex congesta plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex congesta include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Ilex congesta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, with the berries often used in jams and preserves due to their sweet and slightly tart flavor.
